name: Project.Feature.Command.PrintCommandExecution_Feature
observations: Node-level print command execution replaces hierarchical execution in context menu
Executes ONLY print-based commands: FBC print, RPC print, LOG display (no BsTool)
Three-phase execution: Phase 1 (Print FBC), Phase 2 (Print RPC), Phase 3 (Display LOG)
Implemented in process_node_print_commands() method in NodeTreePresenter
Context menu label: Execute All Print Commands for [nodename]
Provides focused workflow for data display/review without triggering processing

name: Project.Feature.UI.LOGSubgroupContextMenu_Feature
observations: Added LOG subgroup support to context menu system
Provides Print All LOG Tokens for [nodename] option
Mirrors FBC and RPC subgroup menu functionality
Implemented via process_all_log_subgroup_commands() method
Achieves subgroup parity across all token types
Previously missing LOG subgroup menu now complete

name: Project.Method.Presenter.ProcessNodePrintCommands_Method
observations: Executes print-only commands for node hierarchically
Phase 1: queues FBC commands, Phase 2: queues RPC print commands, Phase 3: displays LOG files
Excludes BsTool processing unlike process_node_hierarchical_commands()
Located in src/commander/presenters/node_tree_presenter.py
Emits log_file_selected_signal for LOG file display
Provides clear status messages for each phase

name: Project.Method.Presenter.ProcessAllLogSubgroupCommands_Method
observations: Handles LOG subgroup print operations
Mirrors process_all_fbc_subgroup_commands and process_all_rpc_subgroup_commands
Displays LOG files by emitting log_file_selected_signal
Does NOT execute BsTool processing
Located in src/commander/presenters/node_tree_presenter.py

name: Project.Configuration.MenuFilterRules_v1.2
observations: Updated menu filter rules to include LOG subgroup support
Added LOG to section_type arrays alongside FBC and RPC
Version bumped from 1.1 to 1.2
Description: Context menu filtering rules with LOG subgroup support
Located in config/menu_filter_rules.json

name: Project.Test.Unit.NodePrintCommandsTest_Suite
observations: Comprehensive test suite for print command execution feature
5 test cases: context menu label, LOG subgroup menu, print-only execution, LOG subgroup handler, status messages
All tests passing (5/5)
Located in tests/commander/test_node_print_commands.py
Validates no BsTool execution in print-only mode

name: Project.DesignPattern.UI.SubgroupParity_Pattern
observations: Pattern: ensuring consistent context menu functionality across all subgroup types
Applied to LOG subgroup to match FBC/RPC subgroup behavior
Each subgroup provides Print All [TYPE] Tokens and Clear All [TYPE] Log Files options
Promotes UI consistency and predictable user experience
Demonstrates principle of feature parity across similar UI elements

name: Project.DesignPattern.Command.FocusedCommandWorkflow_Pattern
observations: Pattern: providing specialized command workflows for specific use cases
Print-only workflow excludes processing operations (BsTool)
Complements full hierarchical execution workflow
Allows users to choose between display-focused vs processing-focused operations
Reduces unintended side effects from command execution
